---
title: "03_prokka.Rmd"
output: html_document
date: "2026-07-15"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Find and Annote Genes with Prokka

```bash
head -n 1 ../checkm/bbd_topbins.txt 
```
metabat.26 

```bash 
bin=metabat.26
prokka --outdir $bin --prefix $bin  ../metabat/bins_bbd/${bin}.fa

```
